message:
Update Cargo.lock for version bump 1.0.16 -> 1.0.17

Lockfile updated to reflect the version bump of all workspace crates
(rch, rch-common, rch-telemetry, rch-wkr, rchd) from 1.0.16 to 1.0.17.
This keeps the lockfile in sync with the Cargo.toml version changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2872,7 +2872,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch"
-version = "1.0.16"
+version = "1.0.17"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",
@@ -2932,7 +2932,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch-common"
-version = "1.0.16"
+version = "1.0.17"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",
@@ -2967,7 +2967,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch-telemetry"
-version = "1.0.16"
+version = "1.0.17"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "chrono",
@@ -2988,7 +2988,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rch-wkr"
-version = "1.0.16"
+version = "1.0.17"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "blake3",
@@ -3007,7 +3007,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rchd"
-version = "1.0.16"
+version = "1.0.17"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "axum",
